steps.title: Emphasize the distance
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the distance covered by the Philadelphia and Lancaster Turnpike. The relevant note is that the road was sixty-two miles long, so the best sentence should make that measurement prominent while still using accurate supporting details from the notes.

steps.title: Reject other emphases
steps.content: Choice B emphasizes historical status as the first private turnpike. Choice C emphasizes the cities and construction dates but omits the distance. Choice D emphasizes historic status and the completion year. Choices B, C, and D do not focus on the turnpike's length; Choice A places "sixty-two-mile-long" directly before the road's name. The answer is A.
